questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in active voice.
Let these ancient texts be preserved for posterity.

options.text: Let us preserve these ancient texts for posterity.
You must preserve these ancient texts for posterity.
Let these ancient texts preserve us for posterity.
We have to preserve these ancient texts for posterity.

questions.question_text_full:
Sentences of a paragraph are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful and coherent paragraph.
A. In fact he began his career as a peon in a small firm.
B. Before he joined us as the accounts officer, he was a junior clerk.
C. He learnt typing, accounting and even graduated.
D. But he gradually improved his qualifications.

options.text: CDAB
BADC
CBAD
BCDA

questions.question_text_full:
The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
The girl lay down / on the bed / besides her mother / and went to sleep.

options.text: on the bed
besides her mother
The girl lay down
and went to sleep

questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in passive voice.
Light the lamp of knowledge in every heart.

options.text: Let the lamp of knowledge being lighted in every heart.
Let the lamp of knowledge be lit in every heart.
Let the lamp of knowledge be lighting every heart.
Let the lamp of knowledge light in every heart.

questions.question_text_full:
The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
He went / to the bed / with a / slight fever.

options.text: slight fever
to the bed
with a
He went

questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that expresses the given sentence in reported speech.
Harry said to me, “Don’t wear this expensive watch to school.”

options.text: Harry told me to not wear this expensive watch to school.
Harry told me that don’t wear that expensive watch to school.
Harry told me that not to wear that expensive watch to school.
Harry told me not to wear that expensive watch to school.
